abilities.name: Dragon Curse
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Kingdra is your Active Pokémon, you may put 2 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon with δ on its card. This power can't be used if Kingdra is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Extra Flame
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Pokémon-ex, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

tests.name: dragon_curse_damages_delta_pokemon
tests.description: Test that Dragon Curse puts 2 damage counters on opponent's delta Pokemon

tests.name: dragon_curse_requires_active
tests.description: Test that Dragon Curse only works when Kingdra is Active

tests.name: dragon_curse_only_targets_delta
tests.description: Test that Dragon Curse can only target delta Pokemon

tests.name: dragon_curse_blocked_by_special_condition
tests.description: Test that Dragon Curse is blocked by Special Condition

tests.name: extra_flame_bonus_vs_ex
tests.description: Test that Extra Flame does +30 against Pokemon-ex
